decoder_heading: What are your data protection rights?
ident_heading:
What
are your data protection rights?

heading_content_part: The right toaccess –You have theright to request that we provide copies of your personal data, ofwhich we have none.

The right torectification –You havethe right to request that we correct any information we hold that youbelieve is inaccurate. You also have the right to request that wecomplete information you believe is inaccurate. However, we storenone of your data so there is nothing to correct.
The right toerasure–You have theright to request that we erase your personal data, under certainconditions. We do not possess any of your personal data, so anyrequests are automatically fulfilled.
The right torestrict processing –Youhave the right to request that we restrict the processing of yourpersonal data, under certain conditions. We do not possess any ofyour data, nor do we process it.

The right to dataportability–You have theright to request that we transfer the data that we have collected toanother organization, or directly to you, under certain conditions.Since we do note collect, store, or otherwise possess any of yourdata, this would be a blank sheet.Ifyou make a request ,we have one month to respond to you. If you wouldlike to exercise any of these rights, please contact us at our email:[email protected]
Changes to our privacy policyWe keep our privacy policyunder regular review and place any updates on this web page. Thisprivacy policy was last updated January 20th, 2022.
How to contact usEmail us at:[email protected]
